ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the facility */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the facility */,
  "community" TEXT /* Community or district where the facility is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the facility */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility manager */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the facility */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the facility */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the facility */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the facility's image */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the facility's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES facility_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the facility manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the facility manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the facility manager */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the facility manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the facility manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the event is held */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the event */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the event (e.g., sports, concert, etc.) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., public, private, etc.) */,
  "ticket_price" TEXT /* Ticket price for the event */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the event's image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendees" (
  "event_attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event attendee */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attending the event */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., confirmed, pending, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendees_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being booked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the booking */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the booking */,
  "booking_description" TEXT /* Description of the booking */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., confirmed, pending, cancelled, etc.) */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for cancellation (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_payments" (
  "booking_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking payment */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cheque, etc.) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of payment */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_booking_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the maintenance is performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., completed, pending, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., resident, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_ratings" (
  "user_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user rating */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being rated */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event being rated */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating provided by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review comments provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_ratings_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
